data.description:
## Why
Every prompt/criterion change must be eval-gated, not vibes; and the gate currently cannot catch silent
descoping of an externally-expressed requirement.

## What
- A standing per-criterion eval set (recall / false-accept / false-fire) in the workflow-engine eval seam,
  drawn from DSO (read-only) + snap-oakhart-manual + rebar's own tickets — for the NEW plan-review prompts.
- ADD the approved intent-source-fidelity criterion: fires ONLY when the ticket is linked to a session log;
  runs on a FRONTIER model; single-call / 2-STEP fed-context (NOT agent); compares the plan against the linked
  design intent.

## Scope
- Lives in the prompt library / eval seam; the one-shot E1/E4 experiments seed it (docs/experiments is reference).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Per-criterion eval set with the three case types, drawn from all three corpuses; prompt changes eval-gated.
- [ ] intent-source-fidelity in the registry; fires only on a linked session log; frontier model; not agent.
- [ ] DSO stays read-only.
data.title: Standing eval suite (new prompts) + intent-source-fidelity criterion
